title: Present Perfect
description: Understand form, meaning and common IELTS uses of the present perfect tense.

sections.heading: Core rule
sections.body: Use have or has with the past participle when the action connects the past with the present.

sections.heading: IELTS use
sections.body: This tense is useful in speaking and writing when you describe experience, change, and achievements.

title: IELTS Speaking Tips
description: Build longer answers with examples, linking words and natural pacing.

sections.heading: Answer structure
sections.body: Give a direct answer first, then extend it with a reason, an example and a short conclusion.

sections.heading: Fluency focus
sections.body: Practice small pauses between ideas instead of stopping after every sentence.

title: Vocabulary for Travel
description: Learn practical travel words, collocations and topic language for speaking tasks.

sections.heading: Useful collocations
sections.body: Common combinations include public transport, boarding pass, travel itinerary and local cuisine.

sections.heading: Speaking extension
sections.body: Do not only name the place. Add what you saw, how you travelled and why the trip was memorable.
